name: nightcore
description: Nightcore — an autonomous Claude dev studio: Rust + Tauri core over a Bun provider sidecar.

scripts.test: bun run test:node && bun run test:web && bun run test:plugin
scripts.test:node: bun test apps/cli apps/sidecar apps/tui packages/config packages/contracts packages/engine packages/session-fold packages/shared packages/storage
scripts.test:rust: bun run --filter @nightcore/sidecar compile && bun run --filter @nightcore/desktop test
scripts.test:all: bun run test:node && bun run test:web && bun run test:plugin && bun run test:rust
scripts.lint: bun run lint:plugin && eslint . && bun run lint:meta
scripts.audit:all: bun run audit && bun run audit:rust
